notableEvents.label: Yoán Moncada GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yoán Moncada grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Zach Neto out at 2nd. Yoán Moncada out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Sebastián Rivero out at 2nd. Vaughn Grissom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Yoán Moncada.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
